untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (EADB - right bottom low formation identification) cannot be expressed using only the allowed price and technical indicators. Pattern recognition requires structural/shape analysis not available in indicator list. Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT in original signal. Volume trend, throwback/pullback percentage, and success rate statistics not translatable to discrete trading conditions.
translation_notes: Formation end-to-breakout timing of 46 days (5-7 weeks) used as hold_days_max. Entry uses pivot breakout as proxy for breakout detection. Exit uses reversal below SMA_20 as reasonable opposite condition given AUTHOR_SILENT directive. Exact pattern shape (right bottom low marking) requires candlestick pattern recognition unavailable in allowed indicators.
